highlights.description: Gateway provider registry for voice gateways (Twilio, Telnyx)

`WithModel()` option for realtime provider model selection
`WithInstructions()` option for realtime provider system prompts

highlights.description: Typed Encoding system for audio format handling
Encoding normalization handles pcm16, ulaw, wav, and other aliases
IsRawEncoding() for detecting formats that need explicit parameters

added.description: `Encoding.Normalize()` method for canonical encoding names with alias mapping
`Encoding.IsRaw()` method to detect raw audio formats
WAV normalization to Linear16 (WAV is a container for raw PCM)

changed.description: Predefined `AudioFormat` vars use encoding constants instead of strings

tests.description: Comprehensive tests for `Encoding.Normalize()` with all aliases
Tests for `IsRawEncoding()` with raw and container formats

highlights.description: Internal refactoring to reduce code duplication
Generic provider.Client[T] for multi-provider management

refactored.description: Extracted `provider.Client[T]` generic type for multi-provider management

highlights.description: Realtime Provider interface for native voice-to-voice LLMs (OpenAI Realtime, Gemini Live)
Audio format conversion between telephony (mulaw 8kHz) and realtime providers (PCM16 16/24kHz)
RealtimeBridge for seamless telephony-to-realtime provider integration
Dual pipeline modes: text (STT→LLM→TTS) or realtime (voice-to-voice)

added.description: `realtime` package with `Provider` interface for voice-to-voice LLM providers
`ProcessConfig` with instructions, voice, functions, and callbacks
`Client` for multi-provider management with automatic fallback
`audio/format` package with common audio format constants (Twilio, OpenAI, Gemini)
`RealtimeProviderFactory` interface for creating realtime providers from config
`RealtimeBridge` for bridging telephony WebSocket to realtime providers

tests.description: Unit tests for `realtime.Provider` interface and `Client`

Tests for `RealtimeBridge` lifecycle and event handling

highlights.description: Global provider registry with priority-based registration
Architecture documentation for provider implementation

documentation.description: CLAUDE.md with provider registry architecture and implementation guidelines
Step-by-step guide for adding new providers

highlights.description: Voice Gateway interface for provider-agnostic PSTN and WebRTC communication
Session persistence with in-memory and Redis backends
Barge-in detection for user interruption handling

added.description: `gateway` package with `Gateway` interface for PSTN telephony providers (Twilio, Telnyx, Vonage, Plivo)
`Session` and `WebRTCSession` interfaces for active call management
Event types for call lifecycle: `SessionStarted`, `SessionEnded`, `UserSpeechStart`, `AgentSpeechStart`, `Interruption`, etc.
`storage` package with `SessionStore` interface for call state persistence
`RedisStore` for distributed session storage with configurable TTL
`SessionState` type with conversation history, metrics, and recovery data
`bargein` package with `Detector` for user interruption detection
Automatic TTS cancellation on user speech detection
`MulawToWAV()` function in `audio/codec` for WAV container encoding

documentation.description: Voice architecture guide with system design overview

tests.description: Storage interface conformance tests for MemoryStore and RedisStore
Barge-in detector tests for interruption modes and timing

highlights.description: Canonical Transcript format for STT output with embedded JSON Schema
DurationMilliseconds type for JSON-friendly duration serialization

added.description: Canonical `Transcript` type in `stt` package for standardized STT output across providers
Duration fields use `duration.DurationMilliseconds` for integer millisecond JSON serialization

tests.description: `TestNewTranscript` validates transcript creation from transcription results
`TestTranscriptJSONRoundTrip` validates JSON serialization and deserialization

highlights.description: New `resilience` package for provider-agnostic error classification and retry logic
Smart fallback in TTS and STT clients - only switch providers on permanent errors
8 error categories for actionable error handling decisions

added.description: `ErrorCategory` type with 8 categories: transient, rate_limit, validation, auth, not_found, server, quota, unknown
`ErrorInfo` struct with category, retryability, code, message, suggestion, and retry-after hint
`ProviderError` type wrapping provider errors with classification metadata
`Retry()` and `RetryWithResult[T]()` generic retry functions with configurable backoff
`RetryConfig` with max attempts, backoff strategy, classifier, and OnRetry callback
`RetryError` type for exhausted retry attempts with attempt count
`IsProviderError()` helper to extract `ProviderError` from error chain

changed.description: TTS client now uses smart fallback - only switches providers on permanent (non-retryable) errors
STT client now uses smart fallback - only switches providers on permanent (non-retryable) errors
Fallback behavior is now determined by error classification, not error occurrence

tests.description: 44 tests in resilience package covering retry logic, backoff strategies, error types, and categories
4 TTS fallback behavior tests in `tts/fallback_test.go`
4 STT fallback behavior tests in `stt/fallback_test.go`

`WithFixedDuration(ms)` option for mocks returning fixed-length audio
`WithFailAfterN(n, err)` option for testing retry/failover logic
`NewOpenAIMock()` with 6 preconfigured voices (Alloy, Echo, Fable, Onyx, Nova, Shimmer)

tests.description: Comprehensive tests for WAV fixture generation and header validation

fixed.description: Fixed gofmt formatting and added G115 nolint annotations for bounded integer conversions in WAV generation

documentation.description: Testing with Mocks guide covering mock providers, WAV fixtures, and common test patterns
